description: Style Note hugo Energise (limited Spray Edition) from the house of hugo boss guarantees perfumes that you will fall in love with. With fragrances that last long and keeps you feeling fresh all day, these perfumes for men are great inclusions in your perfume collection. Product Details Hugo Energise is a spray perfume for men which comes in an innovative glass flask The top notes are kumquat, mandarin and pink pepper, middle notes are juniper berry and coriander and base notes are jacaranda wood and suede Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 125 ml
